title: Privileged prompts should not be vulnerable to injection attacks
description: Ensure that privileged prompts in Java applications are not susceptible to injection attacks. Injection vulnerabilities can allow attackers to execute arbitrary code or access sensitive data by manipulating input to privileged prompts. Follow secure coding practices to validate and sanitize all user inputs.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize all inputs to privileged prompts. Use parameterized APIs and avoid directly concatenating user input into commands or queries. Regularly review code for injection risks and apply security best practices.
impact: Injection vulnerabilities in privileged prompts can lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, or remote code execution.

checks.message: Validate and sanitize all inputs to privileged prompts. Use parameterized APIs and avoid directly concatenating user input into commands or queries. Regularly review code for injection risks and apply security best practices.
